{"society_power": 0.8, "state_power": 6.8, "society_change": -0.1, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "Consolidated extractive colonial state; Pende Revolt crushed", "reasoning": "The colonial administration deepened bureaucratic reach, indirect rule, forced labor, and taxation\u2014raising state power despite the Depression's fiscal strain\u2014while indigenous society remained atomized, with the Pende Revolt and Kimbanguism violently suppressed."}
